sections.paragraph:
verb לגנוב

to steal, pilfer, purloin

verb להיגנב

be stolen, pilfered, purloined

verb לגנב

to steal frequently

verb גונב

be stolen; be taken secretly

verb להתגנב

to sneak in (or out) , creep

verb להגניב

to pass through stealthily, smuggle in

verb הוגנב

be passed through stealthily, smuggled in

masculine noun and adjective

thief, pilferer, larcenist, filcher, burglar, housebreaker, larcener, moocher, prowler, purloiner, sneak, stealer
